perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) This is a 2D animated video. Two male characters, one with messy gray hair and one bald, are standing together on a street at night. The gray-haired character speaks while the bald character listens. (2) The bald character shows signs of jealousy and embarrassment, with his face turning red and his expressions becoming agitated. (3) A brief animated graphic appears showing three characters sitting at a table together with cups of tea or coffee. (4) Returning to the main scene, the gray-haired character provides a long, calm explanation with a gentle smile. The bald character eventually reacts by shouting with an exaggerated, frustrated expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Soft, melodic background music starts with ambient night sounds like bird chirps. A calm male voice (Senior) begins speaking in Mandarin. (2) A second male voice (A-Chu) enters, sounding somewhat hesitant and defensive. (3) The music stays consistent as the first male voice provides a long, reassuring monologue. (4) A quick 'whoosh' sound effect plays during a visual transition to a graphic. (5) The voices become more intense toward the end, with the second male voice shouting in an exasperated tone as the music stops.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: White subtitles at the bottom center of the frame translate the spoken Mandarin dialogue. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: A persistent header reads '阿啾小劇場' (A-Chu Mini Theater). A blue bar at the bottom contains the title '阿啾吃醋，學長的回答' (A-Chu is jealous, the Senior's answer) and a pink bubble directing viewers to YouTube. (3) Decorative/Effect Text: On-screen captions like '什麼鬼啦' (What the heck) and '阿啾吃醋' appear at key emotional moments to emphasize the humor.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Dialogue intro -> Emotional conflict -> Reassurance monologue -> Comedic conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main animated male characters are depicted throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One boy has gray hair and wears a dark gray t-shirt. The other is bald and wears a black t-shirt; his character is highly expressive.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simplified, blue-toned night street scene featuring a sidewalk and dark silhouettes representing a park or urban background.

vocal_qualities.tone: Calm and reassuring (Senior) versus agitated and expressive (A-Chu)

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic and emotional animated skit that explores friendship and romantic jealousy. It uses a relatable social scenario to entertain its audience and explicitly promote the creator's full-length videos on YouTube.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: On-screen text and a persistent pink call-to-action button direct viewers to a specific YouTube channel.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of the 'A-Chu' animated persona, simplified character designs, and variety-show style comedic text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: This content is a typical social media short-form teaser aimed at converting short-video viewers into long-form YouTube subscribers.
